message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "sidetree-core-go" as actor1
participant "Instance 1" as instance1
participant "Operation Queue" as opq1
participant "orb.operation" as orb1
participant "op-queue DB" as db1
participant "Instance 2" as instance2
participant "Operation Queue" as opq2

actor "sidetree-core-go" as actor2

opq1 -> orb1: Subscribe
activate orb1
orb1 --> opq1: ok
deactivate orb1

opq2 <-..> orb1: Subscribe
activate orb1
orb1 --> opq2: ok
deactivate orb1

actor1 -> opq1: Add(op1)
activate opq1
opq1 -> orb1: Publish(op1)
activate orb1
orb1 --> opq1: ok
deactivate orb1
opq1 --> actor1: ok
deactivate opq1

actor1 -> opq1: Add(op2)
activate opq1
opq1 -> opq2: Publish(op2)
activate opq2
opq2 --> opq1: ok
deactivate opq2
opq1 --> actor1: ok
deactivate opq1

opq1 <-..> opq2: op2
activate opq2
opq2 --> opq1: ok
deactivate opq2

opq1 -> db1: Put(op2,handler1ID,expiry)
activate db1
db1 --> opq1: ok
deactivate db1

opq1 -> orb1: Ack(op2)
activate orb1
orb1 --> opq1: ok
deactivate orb1

opq1 -> opq2: op1
activate opq2
opq2 --> opq1: ok
deactivate opq2

opq2 -> db1: Put(op1,handler2ID,expiry)
activate db1
db1 --> opq2: ok
deactivate db1

opq2 -> orb1: Ack(op1)
activate orb1
orb1 --> opq2: ok
deactivate orb1

@enduml
